ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental health metric */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the metric was collected */,
  "ozone" REAL /* Ozone level */,
  "ozone_pctl" REAL /* Ozone percentile */,
  "pm2_5" REAL /* PM2.5 level */,
  "pm2_5_pctl" REAL /* PM2.5 percentile */,
  "diesel_pm" REAL /* Diesel PM level */,
  "diesel_pm_pctl" REAL /* Diesel PM percentile */,
  "pesticides" REAL /* Pesticides level */,
  "pesticides_pctl" REAL /* Pesticides percentile */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the environmental health metrics were collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the environmental health metrics */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating the quality of the collected data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_health_metrics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the demographic data was collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "age" REAL /* Average age of the population */,
  "asthma" REAL /* Asthma rate */,
  "low_birth_weight" REAL /* Low birth weight rate */,
  "education" REAL /* Education level */,
  "linguistic_isolation" REAL /* Linguistic isolation rate */,
  "poverty" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "demographic_source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic data */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollution_burden_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollution burden score */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the score was calculated */,
  "pollution_burden_score" REAL /* Pollution burden score */,
  "pollution_burden_percentile" REAL /* Pollution burden percentile */,
  "score_calculation_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the pollution burden score */,
  "score_units" TEXT /* Units of the pollution burden score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollution_burden_scores_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population characteristic */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the characteristic was calculated */,
  "population_characteristic_score" REAL /* Population characteristic score */,
  "population_characteristic_percentile" REAL /* Population characteristic percentile */,
  "characteristic_category" TEXT /* Category of the population characteristic */,
  "characteristic_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the population characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_characteristics_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ces_scores" (
  "ces_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CES score */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the score was calculated */,
  "ces_score" REAL /* CES score */,
  "ces_percentile_range" TEXT /* CES percentile range */,
  "ces_score_category" TEXT /* Category of the CES score */,
  "ces_score_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the CES score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ces_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ces_scores_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_pollution" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic pollution data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "traffic" REAL /* Traffic pollution level */,
  "traffic_percentile" REAL /* Traffic pollution percentile */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of traffic in the location */,
  "traffic_speed" REAL /* Average speed of traffic in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_pollution_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cleanup_sites" (
  "cleanup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cleanup site */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the cleanup site is located */,
  "cleanup_sites" INTEGER /* Number of cleanup sites */,
  "cleanup_sites_percentile" REAL /* Cleanup sites percentile */,
  "cleanup_site_type" TEXT /* Type of cleanup site */,
  "cleanup_site_status" TEXT /* Status of the cleanup site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cleanup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cleanup_sites_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groundwater_threats" (
  "groundwater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each groundwater threat */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the groundwater threat is located */,
  "groundwater_threats" INTEGER /* Number of groundwater threats */,
  "groundwater_threats_percentile" REAL /* Groundwater threats percentile */,
  "groundwater_threat_type" TEXT /* Type of groundwater threat */,
  "groundwater_threat_source" TEXT /* Source of the groundwater threat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("groundwater_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_groundwater_threats_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazardous_waste" (
  "hazardous_waste_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazardous waste data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the hazardous waste was generated */,
  "hazardous_waste" REAL /* Hazardous waste level */,
  "hazardous_waste_percentile" REAL /* Hazardous waste percentile */,
  "hazardous_waste_type" TEXT /* Type of hazardous waste */,
  "hazardous_waste_generator" TEXT /* Generator of the hazardous waste */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazardous_waste_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazardous_waste_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impaired_water_bodies" (
  "impaired_water_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impaired water body */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the impaired water body is located */,
  "impaired_water_bodies" INTEGER /* Number of impaired water bodies */,
  "impaired_water_bodies_percentile" REAL /* Impaired water bodies percentile */,
  "impaired_water_body_type" TEXT /* Type of impaired water body */,
  "impaired_water_body_status" TEXT /* Status of the impaired water body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impaired_water_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impaired_water_bodies_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solid_waste" (
  "solid_waste_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solid waste data point */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the solid waste was generated */,
  "solid_waste" INTEGER /* Solid waste level */,
  "solid_waste_percentile" REAL /* Solid waste percentile */,
  "solid_waste_type" TEXT /* Type of solid waste */,
  "solid_waste_management_method" TEXT /* Method used to manage the solid waste */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solid_waste_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solid_waste_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization affiliated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
